name: theseus
description: Open-source packages powering the Theseus agent harness.

scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/theseus-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/theseus-tools/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/theseus-runtime/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/icarus-cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/jsx-md/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/jsx-md-beautiful-mermaid/tsconfig.json --noEmit
